creator: rkoberman@gmail.com
text:
RE: Comment #62 Item #2.

Please don't call the Elantach touchpad a "trackpoint". That term is already in use for the little eraser-like pointer device found on Lenovo and, historically, Dell and HP laptops. Using this term for other pointing devices will only cause confusion. This is particularly significant because the psm driver already has support for that trackpoint and the hw.psm.trackpoint OID tree for sysctls already exists. Also, the term is a trademark of Lenovo.
